hooks.command: { file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if [ -n "$file" ]; then ext="${file##*.}"; case "$ext" in java|js|jsx|mjs|ts|tsx|css|scss|less|sass) encoded=$(python3 -c "import urllib.parse,sys; print(urllib.parse.quote(sys.argv[1]))" "$file"); result=$(curl -s --max-time 5 "http://localhost:63742/api/violations?file=$encoded" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$result" ] && [ "$result" != "[]" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"YanceLint 发现规约违规：$result\", \"continue\": true}"; fi;; esac; fi; }
